note: Only Bayesian-flavored formal home in Mathlib. Mathlib/Probability/Decision/BayesEstimator.lean defines IsBayesEstimator (line 103), IsArgminEstimator (line 111) and proves bayesRisk_eq (line 161) using the posterior kernel from Mathlib/Probability/Kernel/Posterior.lean; docstring literally titles it 'Bayes estimator' / 'Bayes risk'. Covers Bayesian decision theory specifically, not general Bayesian inference (credible intervals, conjugate priors), so field-level container at medium confidence. Path verified as key libraries.Mathlib.modules.Probability.sub.Decision in catalog/data/hierarchy.json (44 decls, sub.Risk).
